full_text:
Chen Duan йҷіз«Ҝ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chen Duan (йҷіз«Ҝ)was born in Runan. One of the seven heroes who gave their lives so Zhao Qian could escape Turbans. Chen Duan was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Chen Duan lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
